svg.text: LoRa-Sec Research Roadmap — Issue Dependency Map
■ solid = all closed ■ dashed-red = open issues ■ dashed-amber = not started ■ solid-teal = active infra → = inherits/depends
Tamarin · ns-3 · HW bench · Threat model
Finding: dst=next-hop → silent black-hole; HMAC insufficient alone
HW feasibility prereq for Paper H
Open AI-Annotated Living LoRa Mesh Dataset · Penghu Pilot · 5 nodes · Discord #lorawild
Cloud LLM · weekly threat taxonomy update
• ChirpOTLE-fork RF anomaly detect. (need maintainer OK)
• GPT-4o → threat YAML pushed to gateways weekly
• Standardization path: Meshtastic RFC → IETF MANET
Node-tier <80KB INT8 CNN · fingerprint:32 per packet
• DP ε=1.0 privacy (inherits E protocol, SSIM<0.4)
• fingerprint:32 IS the LoRaWild packet field (UC3)
• Quantized transformer on Raspberry Pi 4B + SX1302
• PCSS Φ metric computed live per-packet (F→I)
→ I writes security_event layer to LoRaWild
Scaling & Real Deployment: G+H+I Integrated System
• Penghu multi-island mesh: Magong–Baisha–Xiyu (~8km sea hops)
• 3-timescale eval: attack resilience / topology drift / enviro. adapt.
Target: Q3 2027 | #98 ○ not started UC5: seasonal RF + topology drift
Paper K — NeurIPS D&B / SIGCOMM / TPDS
LoRaWild: AI-Annotated Living Dataset for LoRa Mesh Security
• K-infra: 5 nodes, RPi 4B GW, SX1302 HAT, IP65 enclosures #91–94 ▶
• 4-tier access: T0 public agg / T1 anon trace / T2 IRB / T3 IQ-raw (never)
• Privacy: DP ε=1.0, rotating pseudonym, 30-day delay, 500m grid location
• Written after 6 months data collected · #90 active · ImageNet analogy
MeshSecVid: E2E Auth Video over Multi-hop LoRa
✓ closed ○ open ▶ active UC1–5 = LoRaWild use-cases
#30 L4 DV analyzer · #39 RF fingerprint (SDR HW req.)
#53 Paper C taxonomy draft · #67 D/E21 HW (P3) · #72 E/E20 INA219
#90 K-infra ▶ · #91 Penghu pilot · #92 node FW · #93 GW svc · #94 schema
#95 Paper G · #96 Paper H · #97 Paper I · #98 Paper J ○ not started
B→C: dst=next-hop → silent black-hole; HMAC alone insufficient
B→E: 128-d INT8=142B; SSIM<0.4 → no AES needed; DP ε=1.0 · E prereq H
B→F: PCSS SBC(P)∧Φ=1; predicts degradation attacks beyond Dolev-Yao
B–F motivate K; H(node)+I(gw)+G(cloud) annotate LoRaWild; J validates scale
